name: Watchtower Second Floor
description: The second floor overlooks the gatehouse machinery. A heavy iron lever is bolted beside a chain drum.
ambient: The chain mechanism rattles when the wind hits the tower.
From here you can see the sealed courtyard gate below.

objects.name: lever
objects.description: A heavy iron lever linked to the castle gate chain.

on_interact.move: You pull the lever. Chains thunder below as the castle gate rises.
on_interact.look: The lever controls the gate winch from this floor of the tower.
